findings.summary: "products[N].link ASIN <X> is in the broken-links report (HTTP 404) — replace with a verified ASIN" has fired on 50 articles across 2 snapshots — recurring CMO mistake
findings.proposedRule: Before publishing, cross-check every ASIN against data/broken-amazon-links.json. Any DEAD entry must be replaced — never reused.

findings.proposedRule: In QC, set thumbnail = products[0].image as the final pre-submit step. The card on the homepage MUST show the Best Overall product, not a stale stock photo.
